beginner.title: Adjectives: old, interesting, expensive
beginner.content:
📌 Tính từ (Adjectives) là gì?
Tính từ mô tả đặc điểm của danh từ: màu sắc, kích thước, tính cách, cảm xúc, v.v.
• Màu sắc: red, blue, green, white, black
• Kích thước: big, small, tall, short, long
• Tuổi tác: old, young, new, ancient
• Chất lượng / Đánh giá: good, bad, interesting, boring, expensive, cheap
• Cảm xúc / Trạng thái: happy, sad, tired, hungry, angry, excited
📐 Vị trí của tính từ
1. Trước danh từ (Attributive position):
→ It's an expensive guitar. ✅
→ It's a guitar expensive. ❌
→ She has a new car. ✅

2. Sau động từ TO BE (Predicative position):
→ This guitar is expensive.
→ Her car is new.
→ Is the guitar expensive? Yes, it is.

3. Sau các động từ giác quan (feel, look, smell, sound, taste):
→ Your idea sounds interesting.
→ This soup tastes horrible.
→ You look tired.
→ These cookies smell delicious.
→ I feel depressed.
⚠️ Tính từ KHÔNG có dạng số nhiều
Tính từ tiếng Anh không thay đổi khi danh từ ở số nhiều:
❌ These are my favourites shoes. → ✅ These are my favourite shoes.
❌ She has blues eyes. → ✅ She has blue eyes.
❌ They are goods students. → ✅ They are good students.
🔢 Thứ tự tính từ khi dùng nhiều tính từ
Khi dùng nhiều tính từ trước danh từ, thứ tự thường là:
Số lượng → Đánh giá → Kích thước → Tuổi → Màu sắc → Quốc tịch → Chất liệu + Danh từ
→ a beautiful small old red Italian car
→ two expensive new black shoes
⚠️ Ở A1, thường chỉ dùng 1-2 tính từ cùng lúc.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She is a doctor good. → ✅ She is a good doctor.
❌ The film was bored. → ✅ The film was boring. (tôi = bored / phim = boring)
❌ He is very interest in music. → ✅ He is very interested in music.
❌ They have bigs houses. → ✅ They have big houses.
It's an expensive guitar.Đó là một cây đàn guitar đắt tiền.
You look tired. Are you OK?Bạn trông mệt mỏi vậy. Bạn có ổn không?
These beautiful shoes are very comfortable.Đôi giày đẹp này rất thoải mái.

exercises.q: She has ___ hair. (long / black / beautiful – đặt đúng vị trí)
exercises.opts: beautiful long black,long beautiful black,black beautiful long,beautiful black long
exercises.exp: Thứ tự: đánh giá (beautiful) → kích thước (long) → màu (black)
expensive bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm /e/ → dùng 'an'
Dùng 'sounds' với idea (ý tưởng nghe có vẻ...)
Tính từ không có dạng số nhiều → favourite (không có 's')
Tính từ không thêm 's' dù danh từ số nhiều

exercises.q: The soup ___. I don't like it.
exercises.opts: tastes horrible,taste horrible,tastes horribly,is taste horrible
exercises.exp: Sau động từ giác quan 'taste' dùng tính từ, không phải trạng từ
hard-working là tính từ ghép dùng trước danh từ

exercises.q: The film was really ___. I fell asleep.
exercises.exp: boring = mô tả thứ gì đó gây nhàm chán; bored = cảm giác nhàm chán
interested in = (người) cảm thấy thích thú về...
Thứ tự: đánh giá (beautiful) trước đặc điểm (sunny)
Kích thước (big) trước tuổi (old)
looks sad = trông có vẻ buồn (nhìn bằng mắt)
smell + tính từ = mùi như thế nào; cookies có mùi thơm
Trước danh từ 'view' cần tính từ → wonderful

exercises.q: I feel ___ today. I think I have a cold.
exercises.exp: Sau 'feel' dùng tính từ: feel terrible (cảm thấy tệ)

exercises.q: He bought a ___ car last year.
exercises.opts: new red sports,red sports new,sports new red,new sports red
exercises.exp: Thứ tự: đánh giá/tuổi (new) → màu (red) → loại (sports)

exercises.q: The ___ children played in the park.
exercises.exp: Thứ tự tính từ: đánh giá/cảm xúc (happy) trước tuổi (young)
Tính từ phải đứng TRƯỚC danh từ
Tính từ không có dạng số nhiều
boring = (phim/thứ gì đó) gây buồn chán; bored = (người) cảm thấy buồn chán
Dùng tính từ trước danh từ
Sau 'taste' dùng tính từ
Tính từ không có số nhiều
Mô tả vật dùng đuôi -ing
Sau 'feel' dùng tính từ
Tính từ không thêm 's'
Màu sắc là tính từ
Tính từ số ít/nhiều như nhau
Cảm giác của người dùng đuôi -ed
Đặc điểm của vật dùng đuôi -ing
Tính từ không thêm 's'
Dùng tính từ bổ nghĩa cho danh từ
Sau To Be dùng tính từ
Tính từ không có số nhiều
Tính từ mô tả thời tiết
Sau To Be dùng tính từ
Dùng tính từ quốc tịch
Tính từ trước danh từ
Tính từ không thêm 's'
Tính từ trước danh từ

reorder.words: It is an expensive guitar
She has beautiful long black hair
Your idea sounds very interesting
These cookies smell absolutely delicious
He looks very tired today
The film was really boring
I am very interested in history
They live in a big old house
What a wonderful view
She is a very hardworking student
I feel terrible today
The soup tastes horrible
He bought a new red sports car
The happy young children played outside
She has blue eyes and fair skin
It is a small but comfortable apartment
The weather is hot and humid today
This is my favourite blue dress
The old man has a kind face
That was an amazing and unforgettable trip

passage.text: My best friend's name is Minh. He is {{1}} and very {{2}}. He has {{3}} hair and {{4}} eyes. His house is {{5}} but very {{6}}. He has a {{7}} dog called Rex. Rex is {{8}} and very {{9}}. Minh is always {{10}} when he plays with Rex.

Our classroom is {{1}} and {{2}}. The walls are {{3}} and the floor is {{4}}. There are twenty {{5}} desks. The windows are {{6}} so we get a lot of light. Our teacher is {{7}} and very {{8}}. She has {{9}} hair. The students are all {{10}} and ready to learn.

My city is {{1}} and {{2}}. There are many {{3}} buildings and {{4}} parks. The streets are usually {{5}}. The people are very {{6}}. The food is {{7}} and {{8}}. In summer, the weather is {{9}} but the evenings are {{10}} and enjoyable.

Yesterday I went to a {{1}} market. Everything was {{2}} and {{3}}. There were {{4}} vegetables and {{5}} fruit. The sellers were {{6}} and very {{7}}. I bought a {{8}} dress and some {{9}} shoes. I was very {{10}} with my purchases.

My new phone is {{1}} and very {{2}}. The screen is {{3}} and {{4}}. The camera takes {{5}} photos. The battery life is {{6}}. The design is {{7}} and {{8}}. It was quite {{9}} but I think it is worth it. I am very {{10}} with it.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả người bạn thân nhất của bạn (ngoại hình, tính cách)
writing_prompts.example: My best friend is Lan. She is tall and slim. She has long black hair and beautiful brown eyes. She is very kind and friendly. She is also very intelligent.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả căn phòng của bạn hoặc ngôi nhà bạn đang ở
writing_prompts.example: My room is small but comfortable. The walls are light blue. I have a big white desk and a soft bed. My room is always clean and tidy. I love my room very much.

writing_prompts.vi: Nói về một bộ phim hoặc cuốn sách bạn yêu thích
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: adjectives to describe feelings and things
writing_prompts.example: My favourite film is Inside Out. It is very funny and exciting. The story is interesting and the characters are amazing. It sounds sad but it makes me feel happy. I always watch it when I feel bored.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả thành phố hoặc địa điểm bạn yêu thích
writing_prompts.example: I love Hoi An. It is a beautiful old town in central Vietnam. The streets are narrow but very colourful. The food is delicious and cheap. The people are friendly and helpful. It is not very busy or noisy. I feel very peaceful there.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả con vật yêu thích của bạn (thật hoặc tưởng tượng)
writing_prompts.example: My favourite animal is a cat. Cats are small and soft. They have big eyes and fluffy fur. My cat is orange and white. She is very playful but sometimes she is lazy. She looks cute when she sleeps.

beginner.title: Adverbs of Manner: quickly, slowly, well
beginner.content:
📌 Trạng từ chỉ cách thức là gì?
Trạng từ chỉ cách thức (Adverbs of Manner) mô tả cách thức thực hiện hành động.
Chúng trả lời câu hỏi: How? (Như thế nào?)
→ She sings beautifully. (Cô ấy hát rất hay.)
→ He runs fast. (Anh ấy chạy nhanh.)
→ They work hard. (Họ làm việc chăm chỉ.)
📐 Cách tạo trạng từ từ tính từ
Quy tắcTính từTrạng từ
Bình thường → thêm -lyslow, quick, loud, softslowly, quickly, loudly, softly
Tận cùng -y → đổi y thành i + lyhappy, easy, heavy, angryhappily, easily, heavily, angrily
Tận cùng -le → đổi e thành ygentle, simple, comfortablegently, simply, comfortably
Tận cùng -ic → thêm -allybasic, automaticbasically, automatically
Bất quy tắcgood, hard, fast, late, earlywell, hard, fast, late, early
⚠️ hard ≠ hardly (hard = chăm chỉ; hardly = hầu như không)
⚠️ late ≠ lately (late = trễ; lately = gần đây)
⚠️ fast vừa là tính từ vừa là trạng từ (không có 'fastly')
🔄 Tính từ hay Trạng từ?
Tính từ mô tả danh từ: She is a slow driver. (She = slow driver)
Trạng từ mô tả động từ: She drives slowly. (drives = how? slowly)

So sánh:
• He is a careful driver. (adj – mô tả người lái)
• He drives carefully. (adv – mô tả cách lái)
• She is good at tennis. (adj sau be)
• She plays tennis well. (adv – mô tả cách chơi)
📍 Vị trí của trạng từ cách thức
Trạng từ cách thức thường đặt sau động từ (và tân ngữ nếu có):
→ She speaks English fluently. ✅
→ She fluently speaks English. (ít phổ biến hơn)
→ He finished the work quickly.
→ They played the game badly.

⚠️ KHÔNG đặt trạng từ giữa động từ và tân ngữ:
❌ She speaks fluently English.
✅ She speaks English fluently.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She sings beautiful. → ✅ She sings beautifully.
❌ He drives fastly. → ✅ He drives fast. (fast không thêm -ly)
❌ She did good in the test. → ✅ She did well in the test.
❌ He works hardly every day. → ✅ He works hard every day.
❌ She speaks fluently English. → ✅ She speaks English fluently.
She speaks English very fluently.Cô ấy nói tiếng Anh rất trôi chảy.
He runs extremely fast.Anh ấy chạy cực kỳ nhanh.
The students listened carefully to the teacher.Các học sinh lắng nghe giáo viên cẩn thận.

exercises.q: She sings very ___. She has a wonderful voice.
exercises.exp: Sau động từ 'sings' cần trạng từ: beautifully (beautiful + ly)

exercises.q: He is a ___ driver. He never has accidents.
exercises.exp: Trước danh từ 'driver' cần tính từ: careful
Sau động từ 'drives' cần trạng từ: carefully

exercises.q: He runs ___. He is the fastest in the class.
exercises.exp: fast vừa là tính từ vừa là trạng từ – không có 'fastly'

exercises.q: She did very ___ in her exam.
exercises.exp: good → well (bất quy tắc); 'well' là trạng từ của 'good'

exercises.q: Please speak ___. I can't hear you.
exercises.exp: Sau speak cần trạng từ: loudly (loud + ly)

exercises.q: He works ___ every day. He never rests.
exercises.exp: hard (chăm chỉ) ≠ hardly (hầu như không) – đây cần 'hard'

exercises.q: The baby is sleeping. Please close the door ___.
exercises.exp: Sau 'close the door' cần trạng từ: quietly (quiet + ly)

exercises.q: She ___ solved the problem. It was very easy for her.
exercises.exp: easy → easily (đổi y thành i + ly)
Sau 'answered' cần trạng từ: correctly (correct + ly)

exercises.q: The children played ___ in the garden.
exercises.exp: Sau 'played' cần trạng từ: happily (happy → happily, đổi y→i+ly)

exercises.q: She speaks English ___. (đặt trạng từ đúng chỗ)
exercises.opts: fluently,speaks fluently English,fluently speaks,English fluently speaks
exercises.exp: Trạng từ cách thức đặt SAU động từ và tân ngữ: speaks English fluently

exercises.q: She finished the test ___ and got a perfect score.
exercises.exp: Sau 'finished the test' cần trạng từ: perfectly (perfect + ly)

exercises.q: He is a ___ worker. His boss is very happy.
exercises.exp: Trước danh từ 'worker' cần tính từ: hard-working

exercises.q: The injured man walked ___ to the hospital.
exercises.exp: Sau 'walked' cần trạng từ: slowly (slow + ly)

exercises.q: The dog barked ___ at the stranger.
exercises.exp: Sau 'barked' cần trạng từ: angrily (angry → angrily, đổi y→i+ly)
Sau động từ cần trạng từ, không phải tính từ
'fast' không có dạng 'fastly' – fast là cả tính từ lẫn trạng từ
'hardly' = hầu như không; 'hard' = chăm chỉ. Cần 'hard' ở đây.

exercises.q: She did good in the test.
exercises.exp: 'well' là trạng từ của 'good'; sau 'did' cần trạng từ
Trạng từ của 'fast' vẫn là 'fast'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho động từ 'sing'
'hard' là trạng từ chỉ sự chăm chỉ
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'listen'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'speak'
Trạng từ của 'easy' là 'easily'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'shine'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'answer'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'dance'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'smile'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'write'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'fall'
Trạng từ của 'good' là 'well'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'shout'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'live'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'walk'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'work'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'pass'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'treat'
Trạng từ bổ nghĩa cho 'drive'

reorder.words: She sings very beautifully
He runs extremely fast
She speaks English very fluently
The students listened carefully to the teacher
He works very hard every day
Please close the door quietly
She easily solved the problem
He answered all the questions correctly
The baby slept very peacefully
He drove carefully through the busy street
She did very well in her exam
The children played happily in the garden
He finished the test quickly and perfectly
She smiled warmly at the new student
The dog ran away suddenly
He speaks slowly so we can understand
She danced gracefully on the stage
They worked together efficiently
He sang badly at the competition
She walked slowly to the front of the class

passage.text: Anna is a very {{1}} student. She always listens {{2}} in class. She reads {{3}} and understands everything. She writes {{4}} and her handwriting is clear. She speaks English {{5}}. She {{6}} helps her classmates. She solves maths problems {{7}}. She passed all her tests {{8}}. Her teachers always smile {{9}} when they talk about her. She works {{10}} every day.

Yesterday was a busy day. I woke up {{1}} at 6 a.m. I got dressed {{2}} because I was late. I ran {{3}} to the bus stop. I breathed {{4}} when I got on the bus. At work, I typed {{5}} on my computer. My boss spoke {{6}} but I understood everything. I finished my report {{7}}. On the way home, it rained {{8}}. I walked {{9}} to avoid puddles. I arrived home, ate {{10}}, and went straight to bed.

My little brother Tom eats very {{1}}. He chews his food {{2}} and talks {{3}} at the same time. He laughs {{4}} when he watches cartoons. He plays football {{5}}. He reads {{6}} but he learns {{7}}. He sings {{8}} but he thinks he is great. He sleeps {{9}} every night. Our parents love him {{10}}.

The class presentation went well. First, Lan spoke {{1}} and clearly. Everyone listened {{2}}. She explained the topic {{3}} with pictures. She answered questions {{4}}. Her partner, Nam, wrote {{5}} on the board. They worked {{6}} as a team. The teacher smiled {{7}} and nodded {{8}}. At the end, everyone clapped {{9}}. The two students bowed {{10}} and sat down.

The dog waited {{1}} by the door for its owner. It wagged its tail {{2}} when it heard footsteps. It barked {{3}} when a stranger came near. It ate its food {{4}} and drank {{5}}. It slept {{6}} on its soft bed. It played {{7}} with children. When it was cold, it snuggled {{8}} under the blanket. It learned new tricks {{9}}. The whole family loved it {{10}}.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả cách bạn học tiếng Anh (học nhanh/chậm, chăm chỉ như thế nào, v.v.)
writing_prompts.example: I study English every day. I listen carefully to the teacher. I practise speaking slowly at first, but now I speak more quickly. I write neatly in my notebook. I work hard because I want to speak English well.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một buổi sáng bận rộn của bạn (dùng trạng từ để mô tả bạn làm mọi thứ như thế nào)
writing_prompts.example: This morning I woke up late. I dressed quickly and ran fast to the bus stop. I breathed heavily on the bus. I walked quietly into the classroom because the lesson had already started. The teacher looked at me seriously. I sat down carefully and smiled politely.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một người bạn ngưỡng mộ và cách họ làm việc/hành động
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: adverbs to describe how someone behaves
writing_prompts.example: I admire my teacher, Miss Lan. She always speaks kindly to all students. She explains everything clearly and patiently. She listens carefully when we have problems. She smiles warmly every morning. She works very hard for her students.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một buổi biểu diễn hoặc cuộc thi bạn đã tham gia
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: adverbs of manner in past tense
writing_prompts.example: Last month I took part in an English speaking contest. I prepared carefully for two weeks. On the day of the contest, I waited nervously. When it was my turn, I walked confidently to the stage. I spoke loudly and clearly. I answered all questions correctly. At the end, everyone clapped enthusiastically. I felt very proud.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một con vật bạn biết và cách nó cư xử
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: adverbs of manner with animal behaviour
writing_prompts.example: My neighbour has a dog named Max. Max barks loudly when strangers come. He runs fast in the garden. He eats quickly and drinks eagerly. He sleeps peacefully at night. He plays happily with children. Max wags his tail excitedly when he sees his owner.

beginner.title: Comparative Adjectives: older than, more important than
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng Comparative?
Dùng dạng so sánh hơn để so sánh 2 người hoặc 2 vật:
→ My car is more expensive than your car.
→ I am older than my brother.
→ This road is longer than that one.
📐 Quy tắc tạo dạng so sánh hơn
Loại tính từQuy tắcVí dụ
1 âm tiếtthêm -erold→older, tall→taller, fast→faster
1 âm tiết, tận cùng: nguyên âm + phụ âmnhân đôi phụ âm + -erbig→bigger, fat→fatter, hot→hotter
Tận cùng -ethêm -rnice→nicer, large→larger
Tận cùng -yđổi y→i + -erhappy→happier, easy→easier, heavy→heavier
2+ âm tiếtmore + tính từmore expensive, more interesting, more comfortable
Bất quy tắchình thức riênggood→better, bad→worse, far→farther/further
🔑 Công thức và các dạng so sánh
So sánh hơn: S + be + adj-er / more + adj + than
→ He is taller than me.
→ This is more interesting than that.

So sánh kém hơn: S + be + less + adj + than
→ Peter is less popular than Marta. (= Marta is more popular)

So sánh bằng: S + be + as + adj + as
→ She is as tall as her sister. (bằng nhau)
→ This is not as expensive as that one. (không bằng)

Nhấn mạnh:
→ much taller (khác nhau nhiều)
→ a bit taller (khác nhau ít)
→ He is much more intelligent than his brother.
→ She is a bit taller than me.
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She is more tall than her sister. → ✅ She is taller than her sister.
❌ He is more old than me. → ✅ He is older than me.
❌ This is more better. → ✅ This is better. (better là bất quy tắc)
❌ She is taller as me. → ✅ She is taller than me.
❌ He runs more fast. → ✅ He runs faster.
My car is more expensive than your car.Xe tôi đắt hơn xe bạn.
I am older than my brother.Tôi lớn hơn anh trai tôi.
This film is much more interesting than the last one.Bộ phim này thú vị hơn nhiều so với cái trước.

exercises.exp: tall (1 âm tiết) → taller (thêm -er)

exercises.q: This book is ___ than that one. (interesting)
exercises.exp: interesting (3 âm tiết) → more interesting
hot (1 âm tiết, nguyên âm + phụ âm) → nhân đôi t + er = hotter
good → better (bất quy tắc)

exercises.q: This exercise is ___ than the last one. (easy)
exercises.exp: easy (tận cùng -y) → đổi y→i + er = easier
happy → happier (đổi y→i + er)

exercises.q: His new apartment is ___ than his old one. (comfortable)
exercises.exp: comfortable (4 âm tiết) → more comfortable

exercises.q: The Amazon is ___ than the Thames. (long)
exercises.exp: long (1 âm tiết) → longer (thêm -er)
bad → worse (bất quy tắc)

exercises.q: This road is ___ than the highway. (narrow)
exercises.exp: narrow (2 âm tiết nhưng thường dùng -er) → narrower

exercises.q: She is ___ as her sister. (as tall)
exercises.opts: as tall as,taller as,more tall than,as taller as
exercises.exp: So sánh bằng: as + adj + as

exercises.q: His car is ___ cheaper than mine.
exercises.exp: Dùng 'much' trước so sánh hơn để nhấn mạnh sự khác biệt lớn

exercises.q: A train is ___ than a bicycle. (fast)
exercises.exp: fast (1 âm tiết) → faster
So sánh kém hơn: less + adj + than

exercises.q: She is ___ taller than me. (just a little)
exercises.exp: 'a bit' trước so sánh hơn = khác nhau một chút

exercises.q: This laptop is ___ expensive ___ that one.
exercises.exp: So sánh hơn: more + adj + than

exercises.q: Vietnamese food is ___ than fast food. (healthy)
exercises.exp: healthy → healthier (đổi y→i + er)

exercises.q: She is more tall than her sister.
exercises.exp: tall (1 âm tiết) → taller, không dùng 'more'

exercises.q: This is more better than that.
exercises.exp: 'better' đã là dạng so sánh hơn của 'good', không thêm 'more'
So sánh hơn dùng 'than', không phải 'as'
Dùng tính từ trước danh từ
Sau 'taste' dùng tính từ
Tính từ không có số nhiều
Mô tả vật dùng đuôi -ing
Sau 'feel' dùng tính từ
Tính từ không thêm 's'
Màu sắc là tính từ
Tính từ số ít/nhiều như nhau
Cảm giác của người dùng đuôi -ed
Đặc điểm của vật dùng đuôi -ing
Tính từ không thêm 's'
Dùng tính từ bổ nghĩa cho danh từ
Sau To Be dùng tính từ
Tính từ không có số nhiều
Tính từ mô tả thời tiết
Sau To Be dùng tính từ
Dùng tính từ quốc tịch
Tính từ trước danh từ
Tính từ không thêm 's'
Tính từ trước danh từ

This book is more interesting than that one
He is much better than his brother at tennis
Today is hotter than yesterday
This exercise is easier than the last one

His new apartment is more comfortable than his old one

Peter is less popular than Marta
A train is faster than a bicycle

Vietnamese food is healthier than fast food
She is a bit taller than her friend
My English is worse than my maths
Is this bag cheaper than that one
He is not as tall as his father
The weather today is much colder than last week
Dogs are friendlier than cats
Her new dress is more beautiful than her old one
The second test was harder than the first

passage.text: Tom and Sam are brothers. Tom is {{1}} than Sam. He is also {{2}} and {{3}}. Sam is {{4}} than Tom but {{5}}. Their father is {{6}} than both of them. He is also much {{7}}. Tom's grades are {{8}} than Sam's because he studies {{9}}. However, Sam is {{10}} than Tom at sport.

The city is {{1}} than the countryside but it is also {{2}}. The air in the city is {{3}} than in the countryside. Life in the city is {{4}} but {{5}}. Jobs are {{6}} to find in the city. Houses are much {{7}} in the city than in the countryside. The countryside is {{8}} and {{9}}. Food in the countryside is often {{10}} and cheaper.

My new school is {{1}} than my old one. The classrooms are {{2}} and {{3}}. The teachers are {{4}} and {{5}}. The library is {{6}} and has {{7}} books. The canteen food is {{8}} and {{9}} than at my old school. I feel {{10}} here because I have made many new friends.

Summer is {{1}} than winter in my city. The days are {{2}} and the nights are {{3}}. The weather is {{4}} but also {{5}}. People feel {{6}} and {{7}}. It is {{8}} to go to the beach in summer. Ice cream tastes {{9}} when the weather is hot. However, some people think winter is {{10}} because they can wear nice clothes.

A smartphone is {{1}} than a basic phone but it is also {{2}}. Smartphones are much {{3}} and have {{4}} features. The cameras are {{5}} and take {{6}} photos. Battery life is {{7}} on basic phones. Basic phones are {{8}} to use. Some people think basic phones are {{9}} for children. Smartphones are definitely {{10}} for work and study.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh thành phố và nông thôn – bạn thích sống ở đâu hơn?
writing_prompts.example: I prefer living in the city. The city is more exciting than the countryside. There are more jobs and more things to do. However, the countryside is quieter and healthier. The air is cleaner and the food is fresher. But I think city life is more convenient for me.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai người trong gia đình bạn
writing_prompts.example: My mum and my dad are very different. My dad is taller and heavier than my mum. My mum is more patient and more organised. My dad is funnier and more relaxed. My mum is better at cooking but my dad is better at fixing things. I love them both.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai con vật (ví dụ: chó và mèo)
writing_prompts.example: Dogs and cats are both popular pets. Dogs are generally bigger and louder than cats. They are also more friendly and more playful. Cats are more independent and quieter than dogs. Cats are easier to look after. However, dogs are more loyal. I think dogs are better pets because they are more active.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh hai phương tiện giao thông bạn hay dùng
writing_prompts.example: I usually travel by motorbike or by bus. Motorbikes are faster than buses in the city. They are also more convenient because you can go anywhere. But buses are cheaper and safer. Motorbikes are more dangerous in heavy traffic. On long journeys, the bus is more comfortable.

writing_prompts.vi: So sánh cuộc sống của bạn bây giờ và 5 năm trước
writing_prompts.example: My life now is very different from five years ago. I am older and taller. I am also more responsible than before. My English is much better now. School is harder but more interesting. I have more friends now. I feel more confident and more independent. I am happier now than I was five years ago.

beginner.title: Superlative Adjectives: the oldest, the most important
beginner.content:
📌 Khi nào dùng Superlative?
Dùng dạng so sánh nhất để so sánh 3 người/vật trở lên, hoặc để nói về thứ gì đó vượt trội nhất trong một nhóm:
→ John is the tallest in the class. (cao nhất lớp)
→ This is the most interesting book I've ever read.
→ She is the best student in the school.
📐 Quy tắc tạo dạng so sánh nhất
Loại tính từQuy tắcVí dụ
1 âm tiếtthe + adj + -estold→the oldest, tall→the tallest
1 âm tiết, tận cùng: nguyên âm + phụ âmnhân đôi phụ âm + -estbig→the biggest, hot→the hottest
Tận cùng -ethêm -stnice→the nicest, large→the largest
Tận cùng -yđổi y→i + -esthappy→the happiest, easy→the easiest
2+ âm tiếtthe most + adjthe most expensive, the most interesting
Bất quy tắchình thức riênggood→the best, bad→the worst, far→the farthest
🔑 Quy tắc quan trọng về cách dùng
1. Luôn dùng THE (hoặc possessive) trước superlative:
→ He is the best. ✅ / He is best. ❌
→ This is my most expensive jacket. ✅
→ That is Paul's best idea. ✅

2. Sau superlative dùng IN trước tên địa điểm hoặc nhóm người:
→ She is the best student in the class. ✅
→ Everest is the highest mountain in the world. ✅
→ He is the tallest in the family. ✅

3. So sánh: -er/-est vs more/most:
→ 1-2 âm tiết ngắn: -er / -est
→ 2+ âm tiết dài: more / most
⚠️ Lỗi thường gặp
❌ She is most beautiful girl in the class. → ✅ She is the most beautiful girl...
❌ He is the most tall. → ✅ He is the tallest.
❌ This is the goodest cake. → ✅ This is the best cake.
❌ She is the best of the class. → ✅ She is the best in the class.
❌ It is most interesting film. → ✅ It is the most interesting film.
John is the tallest student in the class.John là học sinh cao nhất lớp.
This is the most expensive restaurant in the city.Đây là nhà hàng đắt nhất thành phố.
She is the best player on the team.Cô ấy là cầu thủ giỏi nhất trong đội.

exercises.q: He is ___ student in the class. (tall)
exercises.exp: tall (1 âm tiết) → the tallest; superlative luôn cần 'the'

exercises.q: This is ___ film I've ever seen. (interesting)
exercises.opts: the most interesting,the interestingest,most interesting,the more interesting
exercises.exp: interesting (3 âm tiết) → the most interesting

exercises.q: She is ___ singer in the competition. (good)
exercises.opts: the best,the most good,the goodest,the better
exercises.exp: good → the best (bất quy tắc)

exercises.q: What is ___ mountain in the world? (high)
exercises.exp: high (1 âm tiết) → the highest; cần 'the'

exercises.q: This is ___ day of my life. (happy)
exercises.opts: the happiest,the most happy,the happyest,most happy
exercises.exp: happy → the happiest (đổi y→i + est)

exercises.q: That was ___ film of the year. (bad)
exercises.opts: the worst,the most bad,the baddest,the badder
exercises.exp: bad → the worst (bất quy tắc)

exercises.q: This is ___ hotel in the city. (expensive)
exercises.opts: the most expensive,the expensivest,most expensive,the more expensive
exercises.exp: expensive (3 âm tiết) → the most expensive

exercises.q: July is ___ month of the year. (hot)
exercises.exp: hot → the hottest (nhân đôi t + est)

exercises.q: She is ___ girl in her family.
exercises.exp: young (1 âm tiết) → the youngest

exercises.q: This exercise is ___ in the book. (difficult)
exercises.opts: the most difficult,the difficultest,most difficult,the more difficult
exercises.exp: difficult (3 âm tiết) → the most difficult

exercises.q: She is the best student ___ the class.
exercises.exp: Sau superlative dùng 'in' trước tên địa điểm/nhóm người

exercises.q: The Sahara is ___ desert in the world. (large)
exercises.exp: large → the largest (thêm -st vì đã có âm tiết kết thúc -e)

exercises.q: That is ___ idea in the meeting. (creative)
exercises.opts: the most creative,the creativest,the more creative,most creative
exercises.exp: creative (3 âm tiết) → the most creative
funny → the funniest (đổi y→i + est)

exercises.q: It is ___ building in our city.
exercises.exp: tall → the tallest; superlative cần 'the'

exercises.q: This is ___ comfortable sofa in the shop.
exercises.opts: the most comfortable,the comfortablest,most comfortable,the more comfortable
exercises.exp: comfortable (4 âm tiết) → the most comfortable

exercises.q: That was ___ match of the season.
exercises.opts: the most exciting,the excitingest,most exciting,the more exciting
exercises.exp: exciting (3 âm tiết) → the most exciting; cần 'the'

exercises.q: She is most beautiful girl in the class.
exercises.exp: Superlative luôn cần 'THE' trước dạng so sánh nhất

exercises.q: He is the most tall player in the team.
exercises.exp: tall (1 âm tiết) → tallest, không dùng 'most'

exercises.q: This is the goodest cake I've ever eaten.
exercises.exp: good → the best (bất quy tắc, không phải 'the goodest')
So sánh nhất, nhân đôi phụ âm cuối

exercises.q: She is the ___ girl in class. (smart)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

exercises.q: This is the ___ car in the shop. (expensive)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ dài
So sánh nhất của 'good' là 'best'

exercises.q: That was the ___ day of my life. (bad)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất của 'bad' là 'worst'
So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

exercises.q: She is the ___ person I know. (kind)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

exercises.q: This is the ___ room in the house. (cold)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

exercises.q: It is the ___ building in the city. (tall)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn
Tận cùng 'y' đổi thành 'iest'

exercises.q: He is the ___ boy in the team. (fast)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

exercises.q: This is the ___ part of the movie. (exciting)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ dài

exercises.q: She is the ___ woman in the world. (rich)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn
Tận cùng 'y' đổi thành 'iest'
So sánh nhất tính từ dài
So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

exercises.q: He is the ___ man I've met. (interesting)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ dài
So sánh nhất tính từ dài
So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

exercises.q: This is the ___ book in the library. (old)
exercises.exp: So sánh nhất tính từ ngắn

passage.text: Vietnam is a wonderful country. It has some of {{1}} landscapes in Southeast Asia. Ha Long Bay is one of {{2}} natural wonders. The Mekong Delta has {{3}} river system in the country. Ho Chi Minh City is {{4}} city in Vietnam. The Pho in Hanoi is {{5}} dish for many tourists. Vietnamese people are some of {{6}} in the world. The country has {{7}} street food scene in Asia. {{8}} time to visit is spring. Overall, Vietnam is one of {{9}} countries to visit and {{10}} place I have ever been.

Our school had a sports day last week. It was {{1}} day of the school year. In the 100m race, Tom was {{2}} runner. In the long jump, Lisa made {{3}} jump of the day. The tug-of-war was {{4}} event of the day. Class 3B won {{5}} points overall. Their team was {{6}}. The teachers said it was {{7}} sports day they had organised. {{8}} moment was when the little ones ran their race. They were {{9}} things I have ever seen. It was {{10}} day.

I love food from around the world, but I think Vietnamese food is {{1}}. Pho is {{2}} soup in Vietnam. Banh mi is {{3}} street food. Fresh spring rolls are {{4}} healthy option. In my opinion, the markets in Hoi An sell {{5}} food. The spices used in Vietnamese cooking create {{6}} flavours. For me, bun bo Hue is {{7}} spicy dish. Com tam is {{8}} popular lunch dish. Vietnamese coffee is {{9}} coffee I have ever tried. Vietnamese food is definitely {{10}} in the world.

Animals are amazing. The cheetah is {{1}} land animal. The blue whale is {{2}} animal on Earth. The elephant is {{3}} land animal. The hummingbird is {{4}} bird. The tortoise lives {{5}} of all animals. The giraffe is {{6}} land animal. {{7}} dangerous animal in the world is the mosquito. The parrot is {{8}} animal at copying sounds. Dolphins are considered {{9}} marine animals. The ant is {{10}} animal for its size.

Last summer I visited three cities. Paris was {{1}} city I visited. The Eiffel Tower was {{2}} sight. The food was {{3}} I've ever tasted. London was {{4}} and {{5}} city of the three. The museums were {{6}} in Europe. Rome was {{7}} city. The ancient ruins were {{8}} historical sites I have ever seen. The pizza there was {{9}} food on my trip. Overall, Rome was {{10}} city I visited.

writing_prompts.vi: Nói về 3 thứ lớn nhất / đẹp nhất / thú vị nhất ở Việt Nam
writing_prompts.example: Vietnam has many wonderful things. Ha Long Bay is the most beautiful place in Vietnam. The Mekong River is the longest river in the south. Ho Chi Minh City is the biggest and most modern city. Vietnamese pho is the most famous dish in the world. And Vietnamese people are the friendliest I have ever met.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả người đặc biệt nhất trong gia đình bạn và tại sao
writing_prompts.example: The most special person in my family is my grandmother. She is the oldest person in our family. She is also the kindest and the most patient. She makes the best food I have ever eaten. She tells the most interesting stories. She works the hardest even at her age. She is the most important person in my life.

writing_prompts.vi: Nói về bộ phim / cuốn sách / bài hát hay nhất bạn từng biết
writing_prompts.example: The best film I have ever seen is Interstellar. It is the most exciting and the most intelligent film. The story is the most interesting one I know. The music is the most beautiful soundtrack. It is not the funniest film but it is the most thought-provoking. The ending is the most surprising part.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả kỳ nghỉ hoặc chuyến đi tuyệt vời nhất trong cuộc đời bạn
writing_prompts.example: The best holiday of my life was in Da Nang. It was the most beautiful beach I have ever visited. The seafood there was the most delicious I have ever eaten. The hotel was the most comfortable I have stayed in. The locals were the friendliest people I have met. It was the most relaxing holiday and the most memorable experience.

writing_prompts.vi: Nói về môn học bạn thích nhất và môn bạn thấy khó nhất
writing_prompts.example: My favourite subject is English. It is the most interesting and the most useful subject for me. The teacher makes it the most enjoyable lesson. However, mathematics is the most difficult subject for me. The problems are the hardest ones I have to solve. Science is the most exciting practical subject. Art is the most relaxing class of the week.
